query:
-- Remover histórico de leads com telefones sequenciais
DELETE FROM lead_history
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE 
    telefone LIKE '%00000%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%11111%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%22222%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%33333%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%44444%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%55555%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%66666%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%77777%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%88888%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%99999%'
);

-- Remover logs de distribuição
DELETE FROM distribution_log
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE 
    telefone LIKE '%00000%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%11111%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%22222%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%33333%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%44444%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%55555%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%66666%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%77777%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%88888%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%99999%'
);

-- Remover estoque de leads
DELETE FROM lead_estoque
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE 
    telefone LIKE '%00000%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%11111%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%22222%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%33333%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%44444%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%55555%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%66666%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%77777%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%88888%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%99999%'
);

-- Remover histórico de atribuições
DELETE FROM historico_atribuicoes
WHERE leadId IN (
  SELECT id FROM leads
  WHERE 
    telefone LIKE '%00000%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%11111%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%22222%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%33333%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%44444%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%55555%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%66666%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%77777%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%88888%'
    OR telefone LIKE '%99999%'
);
